title: Fortis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Fortis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
